steps.title_large: How to Book with Luxury location
steps.step_1_desc: Browse our diverse fleet and choose the car that suits your needs and budget.
steps.step_2_desc: Select the pick-up date and time and return date according to your schedule.

steps.step_4_desc: Pick up your car at our location or we deliver it to you anywhere in Algeria.
